        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"AI Art Generation\"\ndescription: \"Create custom game assets using AI with style presets and prompt enhancement\"\nicon: \"wand-magic-sparkles\"\n---\n\n## AI Art for Prototyping\n\nSummer's AI art generation is designed specifically for **game development prototyping**. It's not about creating final production art—it's about getting your game playable and testable quickly.\n\n**Realistic Expectations:**\n- AI art works best for simple, clear concepts\n- Complex or stylized art may need refinement\n- Perfect for placeholders and iteration\n- Not suitable for polished, commercial releases\n\n**What AI Art Does Well:**\n- Basic character sprites and animations\n- Simple environment backgrounds\n- UI elements and buttons\n- Concept exploration and mood boards\n\n**What Needs Human Artists:**\n- Complex character designs with personality\n- Detailed environment art\n- Brand-consistent visual style\n- High-quality promotional materials\n\n## Getting Started\n\n&lt;Steps&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Open Art Creation\"&gt;\n    In Summer, go to Art → Create New Asset or visit summerengine.com/art/create\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Choose Your Style\"&gt;\n    Select from preset styles like Realistic, Cartoon, Anime, Pixel Art, Low-Poly, or Fantasy\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Write Your Prompt\"&gt;\n    Describe what you want to create in natural language\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Generate and Refine\"&gt;\n    Click Generate and iterate until you get the perfect result\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n&lt;/Steps&gt;\n\n## Writing Effective Prompts\n\n### Basic Structure\nStart with the main subject, then add details about style, mood, and composition:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n[Subject] + [Style] + [Mood/Lighting] + [Composition]\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Examples\n\n**Character Sprites**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nA brave knight in silver armor, cartoon style, bright cheerful lighting, facing forward for game sprite\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Environment Textures**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nSeamless stone brick texture, medieval fantasy style, weathered and moss-covered, tileable pattern\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**UI Elements**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nWooden game button with gold trim, fantasy RPG style, glowing hover effect, ornate carved details\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Concept Art**\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nMystical forest clearing, anime style, soft magical lighting, ancient ruins in background",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "title: \"AI Art Generation\"",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "description: \"Create custom game assets using AI with style presets and prompt enhancement\"",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "icon: \"wand-magic-sparkles\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## AI Art for Prototyping",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "Summer's AI art generation is designed specifically for **game development prototyping**. It's not about creating final production art—it's about getting your game playable and testable quickly.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "**Realistic Expectations:**",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- AI art works best for simple, clear concepts",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- Complex or stylized art may need refinement",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "- Perfect for placeholders and iteration",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- Not suitable for polished, commercial releases",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "**What AI Art Does Well:**",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- Basic character sprites and animations",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "- Simple environment backgrounds",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- UI elements and buttons",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- Concept exploration and mood boards",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "**What Needs Human Artists:**",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- Complex character designs with personality",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- Detailed environment art",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- Brand-consistent visual style",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- High-quality promotional materials",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "## Getting Started",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Steps&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Open Art Creation\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    In Summer, go to Art → Create New Asset or visit summerengine.com/art/create",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Choose Your Style\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    Select from preset styles like Realistic, Cartoon, Anime, Pixel Art, Low-Poly, or Fantasy",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Write Your Prompt\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    Describe what you want to create in natural language",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Generate and Refine\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    Click Generate and iterate until you get the perfect result",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Steps&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "## Writing Effective Prompts",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "### Basic Structure",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "Start with the main subject, then add details about style, mood, and composition:",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "[Subject] + [Style] + [Mood/Lighting] + [Composition]",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "### Examples",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "**Character Sprites**",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "A brave knight in silver armor, cartoon style, bright cheerful lighting, facing forward for game sprite",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "Seamless stone brick texture, medieval fantasy style, weathered and moss-covered, tileable pattern",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "**UI Elements**",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "Wooden game button with gold trim, fantasy RPG style, glowing hover effect, ornate carved details",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./art-system/overview.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 56
          }
        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"Summer Asset Store\"\ndescription: \"Create, share, and discover game assets with AI-powered generation\"\nicon: \"palette\"\n---\n\n## What is the Summer Asset Store?\n\nThe Summer Asset Store is a comprehensive platform for creating, sharing, and discovering game assets - both AI-generated and human-crafted. We believe the future of game development includes both human creativity and AI assistance working together, not replacing each other.\n\n**Our Philosophy**: AI art is a tool, like Photoshop or Blender. It can help developers prototype faster and create placeholder assets, but it will never replace the unique vision, style, and intentionality that human artists bring to games. We're transparent about what's AI-generated and what's human-made, because both have their place in game development.\n\nWhether you need sprites, textures, UI elements, or concept art, you can generate them using AI for rapid prototyping or browse community-created assets made by talented human artists.\n\n## Key Features\n\n&lt;CardGroup cols={2}&gt;\n  &lt;Card\n    title=\"AI Prototyping Tools\"\n    icon=\"wand-magic-sparkles\"\n    href=\"/art-system/ai-generation\"\n  &gt;\n    Generate placeholder and prototype art using AI - clearly labeled as AI-generated\n  &lt;/Card&gt;\n  &lt;Card\n    title=\"Human Artist Gallery\"\n    icon=\"palette\"\n    href=\"/art-system/gallery\"\n  &gt;\n    Browse and support thousands of assets created by real human artists in our community\n  &lt;/Card&gt;\n  &lt;Card\n    title=\"Transparent Labeling\"\n    icon=\"tag\"\n    href=\"/art-system/gallery\"\n  &gt;\n    Every asset is clearly marked as \"AI-Generated\" or \"Human-Created\" - no confusion\n  &lt;/Card&gt;\n  &lt;Card\n    title=\"Artist-Friendly Licensing\"\n    icon=\"scale-balanced\"\n    href=\"/art-system/licensing\"\n  &gt;\n    Fair licensing that protects human artists while enabling AI-assisted prototyping\n  &lt;/Card&gt;\n&lt;/CardGroup&gt;\n\n## Asset Types Supported\n\n### 2D Assets\n- **Sprites**: Character sprites, animations, UI elements\n- **Textures**: Seamless textures, materials, backgrounds\n- **UI Graphics**: Buttons, icons, panels, HUD elements\n- **Concept Art**: Character designs, environment concepts\n\n### 3D Assets",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./quickstart.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 43,
            "column": 4

        "contents": "---\ntitle: 'Quick Start'\ndescription: 'Build your first game in 5 minutes'\n---\n\n## Welcome to Summer\n\nSummer is The AI Game Engine. We make game development as fun as playing games. No coding experience? No problem. Just tell Summer what you want to build.\n\n## Step 1: Download Summer\n\nGetting Summer on your computer is super easy.\n\n&lt;AccordionGroup&gt;\n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"download\" title=\"Get Summer for free\"&gt;\n    **For Mac users:**\n    - Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and click \"Download for Mac\"\n    - Drag Summer to your Applications folder\n    - Double-click to open (Mac might ask for permission - that's normal!)\n\n    **For Windows users:**\n    - Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and click \"Download for Windows\"  \n    - Run the installer (Windows might ask for permission - click \"Yes\")\n    - Summer will be ready to go!\n\n    &lt;Tip&gt;Summer is completely free to download and try. No credit card required!&lt;/Tip&gt;\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"user\" title=\"Create your account\"&gt;\n    1. **Open Summer** → You'll see a clean, friendly interface\n    2. **Click \"Sign in\"** → This opens your web browser  \n    3. **Create account** → Use Google, GitHub, or email - whatever you prefer\n    4. **Back to Summer** → The app will automatically log you in\n\n    &lt;Tip&gt;We use your browser for security - Summer never sees your password!&lt;/Tip&gt;\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n&lt;/AccordionGroup&gt;\n\n## Step 2: Build Your First Game\n\nThis is where the magic happens. Let's create something awesome!\n\n&lt;AccordionGroup&gt;\n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"plus\" title=\"Start a new game\"&gt;\n    ",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "title: 'Quick Start'",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "description: 'Build your first game in 5 minutes'",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## Welcome to Summer",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "Summer is The AI Game Engine. We make game development as fun as playing games. No coding experience? No problem. Just tell Summer what you want to build.",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## Step 1: Download Summer",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "Getting Summer on your computer is super easy.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;AccordionGroup&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Accordion icon=\"download\" title=\"Get Summer for free\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    **For Mac users:**",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and click \"Download for Mac\"",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Drag Summer to your Applications folder",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Double-click to open (Mac might ask for permission - that's normal!)",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    **For Windows users:**",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and click \"Download for Windows\"  ",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Run the installer (Windows might ask for permission - click \"Yes\")",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Summer will be ready to go!",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;Tip&gt;Summer is completely free to download and try. No credit card required!&lt;/Tip&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Accordion&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Accordion icon=\"user\" title=\"Create your account\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    1. **Open Summer** → You'll see a clean, friendly interface",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    2. **Click \"Sign in\"** → This opens your web browser  ",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    3. **Create account** → Use Google, GitHub, or email - whatever you prefer",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    4. **Back to Summer** → The app will automatically log you in",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    &lt;Tip&gt;We use your browser for security - Summer never sees your password!&lt;/Tip&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Accordion&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/AccordionGroup&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "## Step 2: Build Your First Game",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "This is where the magic happens. Let's create something awesome!",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;AccordionGroup&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Accordion icon=\"plus\" title=\"Start a new game\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 44
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./essentials/installation.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 70
          }
        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"Installation\"\ndescription: \"Download and install Summer on your machine\"\nicon: \"download\"\n---\n\n## Godot Compatibility\n\nSince Summer is a **native fork of Godot**, it works with all existing Godot projects, tutorials, libraries, and extensions.\n\n**What works out of the box:**\n- All Godot project files and structures\n- Official Godot documentation and tutorials\n- Third-party libraries and plugins\n- Community assets and tools\n- Export templates for web, desktop, and mobile\n\n**Version tracking:** Summer follows Godot's versioning and maintains compatibility with each Godot release.\n\n## System Requirements\n\nSummer runs on Windows and macOS with the following minimum requirements:\n\n- **OS**: Windows 10+ or macOS 10.14+\n- **RAM**: 4GB minimum, 8GB recommended\n- **Storage**: 2GB available space\n- **Graphics**: OpenGL 3.3 support\n\n## Download Summer\n\n&lt;Card\n  title=\"Download for Your Platform\"\n  icon=\"download\"\n  href=\"https://summerengine.com\"\n&gt;\n  Get the latest version of Summer from our website\n&lt;/Card&gt;\n\n## Installation Steps\n\n&lt;Steps&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Download the installer\"&gt;\n    Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and download the installer for your operating system.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Run the installer\"&gt;\n    Double-click the downloaded file and follow the installation wizard.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Launch Summer\"&gt;\n    Open Summer from your applications folder or start menu.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Create your first project\"&gt;\n    Click \"New Project\" and choose a template to get started.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n&lt;/Steps&gt;\n\n## Verify Installation\n\nOnce installed, you can verify everything is working by:\n\n1. Opening Summer\n2. Creating a new project from a template\n3. Testing the AI chat functionality with a simple request like \"Add a cube to the scene\"\n\nIf you encounter any issues, check our [troubleshooting guide](/desktop/troubleshooting) or reach out on [Discord](https://discord.gg/yUpgtxnZky).\n\n## Next Steps\n\n&lt;Card\n  title=\"First Chat\"\n  icon=\"message\"",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 1

            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Download the installer\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and download the installer for your operating system.",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Run the installer\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    Double-click the downloaded file and follow the installation wizard.",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Launch Summer\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    Open Summer from your applications folder or start menu.",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Create your first project\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    Click \"New Project\" and choose a template to get started.",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Steps&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "## Verify Installation",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "Once installed, you can verify everything is working by:",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Opening Summer",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Creating a new project from a template",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Testing the AI chat functionality with a simple request like \"Add a cube to the scene\"",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "If you encounter any issues, check our [troubleshooting guide](/desktop/troubleshooting) or reach out on [Discord](https://discord.gg/yUpgtxnZky).",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "## Next Steps",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Card",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "  title=\"First Chat\"",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  icon=\"message\"",
            "lineNumber": 70
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.25354549288749695

        "contents": "**Workaround**: Switch to standard models for editor operations\n\n## Performance\n\n### Large Projects\n\n**Supported**: Up to 50K files per project\n\n**Performance**: Initial indexing may take 2-5 minutes for large projects\n\n**Optimization**: Text files get full analysis, assets get metadata scanning\n\n## Coming Soon\n\n&lt;AccordionGroup&gt;\n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"clock\" title=\"Advanced import settings\"&gt;\n    AI-assisted asset import configuration is on the roadmap.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  \n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"clock\" title=\"Large-scale refactoring\"&gt;\n    Cross-file refactoring and project-wide changes are in development.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  \n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"clock\" title=\"Visual shader editing\"&gt;\n    Visual shader graph AI assistance is planned.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  \n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"clock\" title=\"Animation timeline\"&gt;\n    AI-assisted animation keyframing is coming.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n&lt;/AccordionGroup&gt;\n\n### What Works Well\n\n&lt;AccordionGroup&gt;\n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"check\" title=\"Scene composition\"&gt;\n    Adding nodes, setting properties, organizing scene hierarchies works reliably.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  \n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"check\" title=\"Script attachment\"&gt;\n    Creating script stubs, attaching to nodes, opening in external editors.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  \n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"check\" title=\"Project settings\"&gt;\n    Input actions, project configuration, basic export settings.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n  \n  &lt;Accordion icon=\"check\" title=\"Signal connections\"&gt;\n    Connecting node signals with automatic method stub generation.\n  &lt;/Accordion&gt;\n&lt;/AccordionGroup&gt;\n\n## Future Roadmap\n\n### Short-term (next release)\n\n- Real-time file watching (immediate index updates)\n- Improved asset search and preview\n\n### Medium-term\n\n- Cross-project search and templates\n- Visual asset understanding\n- Advanced code generation and refactoring\n\n## Support &amp; Feedback\n\n### If You Encounter Issues\n\n- Check desktop console for &#96;[RAG]&#96; prefixed messages\n- Try asking \"explore my project structure\" if search seems incomplete\n- Report specific cases where AI can't find files you know exist",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./migration/godot.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 57

        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"Migrating from Godot\"\ndescription: \"How to transition from Godot to Summer\"\nicon: \"arrow-right\"\n---\n\n## Coming from Godot?\n\nIf you're familiar with Godot, you'll feel right at home in Summer. The interface, node system, and scripting work exactly the same way you're used to.\n\n&lt;Note&gt;\nQuick migrations will soon be available. As Summer is based on the Godot codebase, it allows us to focus on making the best AI-powered game development experience while maintaining a familiar editing environment. This makes it easy to migrate your existing Godot settings to Summer.\n&lt;/Note&gt;\n\n## What's the Same\n\nEverything you know about Godot still applies in Summer:\n\n- **Node system** - All the same nodes, properties, and relationships\n- **GDScript &amp; C#** - Your existing scripts work without changes  \n- **Scene structure** - &#96;.tscn&#96; files are byte-for-byte identical\n- **Project settings** - Same export options and configurations\n- **Asset pipeline** - Import settings and resource formats unchanged\n\n## Zero Lock-in\n\nSummer projects ARE Godot projects. Identical file formats:\n\n| Format | Description |\n|--------|-------------|\n| &#96;.gd&#96; | GDScript source (text) |\n| &#96;.tscn&#96; / &#96;.scn&#96; | Scene files |\n| &#96;.tres&#96; / &#96;.res&#96; | Resource files |\n| &#96;project.godot&#96; | Project configuration |\n\n**No proprietary formats. No metadata injection.** A &#96;git diff&#96; between a Summer-edited file and a Godot-edited file shows only your changes.\n\n### Team Workflows\n\nTeam members can use Summer and vanilla Godot interchangeably:\n- Artist opens project in Godot, edits scenes\n- Programmer opens same project in Summer, uses AI assistance  \n- Both commit to the same repo\n- No merge conflicts from tooling differences\n\n### Worst Case\n\nSummer disappears tomorrow? Your project opens in Godot 4 without modification. You lose AI assistance. Your game, code, and assets are unaffected.\n\n## What's Different\n\nSummer adds AI capabilities on top of the familiar Godot experience:\n\n### AI Chat Panel\n\n- **Location**: Docked on the right side of the editor\n- **Purpose**: Natural language interface to modify your project",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1

            "text": "title: \"Migrating from Godot\"",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./essentials/authentication.mdx",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 85
          }
        },
        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"Authentication\"\ndescription: \"Set up your Summer account and API access\"\nicon: \"key\"\n---\n\n## Creating Your Account\n\nSummer requires an account to access AI features and sync your projects.\n\n&lt;Steps&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Sign up\"&gt;\n    Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and create a free account.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Verify email\"&gt;\n    Check your email and click the verification link.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Sign in through Summer\"&gt;\n    In Summer, open any project and navigate to the 'Chat' menu in the sidebar. This will open a deeplink to authenticate your account automatically.\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n&lt;/Steps&gt;\n\n## Authentication Process\n\nSummer uses a streamlined authentication system:\n\n1. **Open a Project**: Create or open any project in Summer\n2. **Access Chat**: Click on the 'Chat' menu in the sidebar\n3. **Automatic Authentication**: Summer will open a secure deeplink to authenticate your account\n4. **Return to Summer**: Once authenticated, you'll be redirected back to Summer with full access\n\n## API Key Setup\n\nFor advanced integrations and API access:\n\n&lt;CodeGroup&gt;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash Terminal\n# Set your API key as an environment variable\nexport SUMMER_API_KEY=\"your-api-key-here\"\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript JavaScript\n// Use in your applications\nconst summer = new SummerAPI({\n  apiKey: process.env.SUMMER_API_KEY\n});\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&lt;/CodeGroup&gt;\n\n## Account Tiers\n\n&lt;Card\n  title=\"Free Tier\"\n  icon=\"gift\"\n&gt;\n  - 100 AI operations per month\n  - Basic project templates\n  - Community support\n&lt;/Card&gt;\n\n&lt;Card\n  title=\"Pro Tier\"\n  icon=\"crown\"\n&gt;\n  - Unlimited AI operations\n  - Advanced templates\n  - Priority support\n  - API access\n&lt;/Card&gt;\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n**Can't sign in?**\n- Check your email and password\n- Ensure your account is verified\n- Try resetting your password\n\n**API key not working?**\n- Verify the key is correctly set\n- Check your account tier supports API access\n- Ensure the key hasn't expired\n\nNeed help? Contact us at [founders@summerengine.com](mailto:founders@summerengine.com).",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "title: \"Authentication\"",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "description: \"Set up your Summer account and API access\"",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "icon: \"key\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Creating Your Account",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "Summer requires an account to access AI features and sync your projects.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Steps&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Sign up\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "    Visit [summerengine.com](https://summerengine.com) and create a free account.",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Verify email\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    Check your email and click the verification link.",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;Step title=\"Sign in through Summer\"&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    In Summer, open any project and navigate to the 'Chat' menu in the sidebar. This will open a deeplink to authenticate your account automatically.",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  &lt;/Step&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Steps&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "## Authentication Process",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "Summer uses a streamlined authentication system:",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Open a Project**: Create or open any project in Summer",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Access Chat**: Click on the 'Chat' menu in the sidebar",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Automatic Authentication**: Summer will open a secure deeplink to authenticate your account",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Return to Summer**: Once authenticated, you'll be redirected back to Summer with full access",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "## API Key Setup",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "For advanced integrations and API access:",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;CodeGroup&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash Terminal",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "# Set your API key as an environment variable",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "export SUMMER_API_KEY=\"your-api-key-here\"",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript JavaScript",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "// Use in your applications",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "const summer = new SummerAPI({",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "  apiKey: process.env.SUMMER_API_KEY",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "});",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/CodeGroup&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "## Account Tiers",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53
          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 100 AI operations per month",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Basic project templates",

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;Card",

          },
          {
            "text": "  title=\"Pro Tier\"",

          },
          {
            "text": "  icon=\"crown\"",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Unlimited AI operations",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "&lt;/Card&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "## Troubleshooting",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "**Can't sign in?**",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "- Check your email and password",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "- Ensure your account is verified",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "- Try resetting your password",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "**API key not working?**",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "- Verify the key is correctly set",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "- Check your account tier supports API access",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "- Ensure the key hasn't expired",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "Need help? Contact us at [founders@summerengine.com](mailto:founders@summerengine.com).",
            "lineNumber": 85
          }
        ]
      },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./api-reference/coming-soon.mdx",
        "range": {

        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"MCP Access\"\ndescription: \"Summer's Model Context Protocol integration is in development\"\nicon: \"plug\"\n---\n\n## Coming Soon\n\nWe're building MCP (Model Context Protocol) access to Summer, enabling seamless integration with Cursor, VS Code, and any other IDE that supports MCP. This will let you access Summer's AI capabilities directly from your favorite development environment.\n\n## What's Coming\n\nOur MCP server will provide:\n\n### Seamless IDE Integration\n- Access Summer's AI directly from Cursor, VS Code, or any MCP-compatible editor\n- Natural language requests without leaving your development environment\n- Context-aware responses based on your current project and files\n\n### Game Development Tools\n- **Scene Generation**: \"Create a main menu scene with these buttons...\"\n- **Code Analysis**: \"Review this player controller for performance issues\"\n- **Asset Management**: \"Generate placeholder sprites for these characters\"\n- **Architecture Guidance**: \"Suggest improvements to this game state system\"\n\n### Cross-Project Intelligence\n- Summer understands your project structure across different IDEs\n- Consistent AI assistance whether you're in Summer or your preferred editor\n- Project context that follows you between development environments\n\n### Advanced Workflows\n- **Code Review**: Automated code review with game development best practices\n- **Documentation**: Generate documentation for your game systems\n- **Refactoring**: Large-scale refactoring with game-specific patterns\n- **Testing**: Generate unit tests for your game logic and systems\n\n## Use Cases\n\nHere are some exciting ways developers will use Summer's MCP integration:\n\n### Multi-IDE Workflows\n- **Design in Summer**: Create game scenes and logic in Summer's visual editor\n- **Code in Cursor**: Write complex algorithms with Cursor's AI assistance\n- **Debug everywhere**: Get Summer's game-specific debugging help in any environment\n\n### Team Collaboration\n- **Consistent AI**: Same AI assistant across different team members' preferred IDEs\n- **Shared context**: Summer understands your project regardless of which tool you're using",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "title: \"MCP Access\"",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "description: \"Summer's Model Context Protocol integration is in development\"",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "icon: \"plug\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## Coming Soon",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "We're building MCP (Model Context Protocol) access to Summer, enabling seamless integration with Cursor, VS Code, and any other IDE that supports MCP. This will let you access Summer's AI capabilities directly from your favorite development environment.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "## What's Coming",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "Our MCP server will provide:",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "### Seamless IDE Integration",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- Access Summer's AI directly from Cursor, VS Code, or any MCP-compatible editor",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- Natural language requests without leaving your development environment",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- Context-aware responses based on your current project and files",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "### Game Development Tools",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Scene Generation**: \"Create a main menu scene with these buttons...\"",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Code Analysis**: \"Review this player controller for performance issues\"",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Asset Management**: \"Generate placeholder sprites for these characters\"",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Architecture Guidance**: \"Suggest improvements to this game state system\"",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "### Cross-Project Intelligence",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- Summer understands your project structure across different IDEs",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- Consistent AI assistance whether you're in Summer or your preferred editor",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- Project context that follows you between development environments",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "### Advanced Workflows",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Code Review**: Automated code review with game development best practices",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Documentation**: Generate documentation for your game systems",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Refactoring**: Large-scale refactoring with game-specific patterns",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Testing**: Generate unit tests for your game logic and systems",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "## Use Cases",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "Here are some exciting ways developers will use Summer's MCP integration:",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "### Multi-IDE Workflows",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Design in Summer**: Create game scenes and logic in Summer's visual editor",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Code in Cursor**: Write complex algorithms with Cursor's AI assistance",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Debug everywhere**: Get Summer's game-specific debugging help in any environment",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "### Team Collaboration",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Consistent AI**: Same AI assistant across different team members' preferred IDEs",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Shared context**: Summer understands your project regardless of which tool you're using",
            "lineNumber": 48
          }
        ]

        "contents": "- ❌ Must contact creator before use\n- ❌ Custom licensing terms\n- ❌ Usage rights negotiated individually\n\n&lt;Warning&gt;\nAlways check the license before using an asset in your project. When in doubt, contact the creator directly.\n&lt;/Warning&gt;\n\n## Downloading Assets\n\n&lt;Steps&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Find Your Asset\"&gt;\n    Use filters and search to locate the perfect asset\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Check License\"&gt;\n    Verify the licensing terms match your project needs\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Download\"&gt;\n    Click the download button to save the asset\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n  &lt;Step title=\"Import to Project\"&gt;\n    In Summer, assets are automatically available in your project browser\n  &lt;/Step&gt;\n&lt;/Steps&gt;\n\n## Community Interaction\n\n### Liking Assets\nShow appreciation for community creations by liking assets you find useful or inspiring. This helps creators understand what the community values.\n\n### Following Creators\nBuild connections with talented artists by following their profiles. You'll be notified when they upload new assets.\n\n### Providing Feedback\nLeave constructive comments and suggestions to help creators improve their work and build a supportive community.\n\n## Quality and Curation\n\n### Community Standards\nThe Summer community maintains high standards for asset quality:\n\n- **Technical Quality**: Assets should be properly formatted and optimized\n- **Originality**: Original creations or properly licensed derivatives\n- **Usefulness**: Assets should serve a clear game development purpose\n- **Proper Metadata**: Accurate titles, descriptions, and tags\n\n### Reporting Issues\nIf you encounter assets that violate community guidelines:\n1. Use the report button on the asset page\n2. Provide specific details about the issue\n3. The moderation team will review and take appropriate action\n\n## Tips for Effective Browsing\n\n### Use Multiple Filters\nCombine asset type, style, and keyword filters to narrow down results effectively.\n\n### Check Creator Portfolios\nIf you like one asset from a creator, check their profile for similar high-quality work.\n\n### Save to Collections\nUse collections to organize assets by project, style, or theme for easy retrieval.",

        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "---\ntitle: \"API Coming Soon\"\ndescription: \"Summer's API is currently in development\"\n---\n\n## Coming Soon\n\nSummer's API is currently under active development. We're building a comprehensive API that will allow developers to integrate Summer's AI capabilities into their own tools and workflows.\n\n## What's Coming\n\nOur API will include:\n\n### AI Chat Integration\n- Programmatic access to Summer's AI chat functionality\n- Send natural language requests and receive structured responses\n- Integration with your existing development tools and workflows\n\n### Project Management\n- Create and manage Summer projects via API\n- Upload and sync project files\n- Access project intelligence and codebase analysis\n\n### Asset Generation\n- AI-powered art generation through API calls\n- Batch processing for multiple assets\n- Integration with the community asset gallery\n\n### Webhook Support\n- Real-time notifications for AI operations\n- Project change events\n- Asset generation completion callbacks\n\n## Early Access\n\nWe're currently working with select partners for early API access. If you're interested in being part of our API beta program:\n\n&lt;Card\n  title=\"Join the Beta\"\n  icon=\"flask\"\n  href=\"mailto:founders@summerengine.com?subject=API Beta Access\"\n&gt;\n  Email us at founders@summerengine.com to discuss early access\n&lt;/Card&gt;\n\n## Timeline\n\n**Current Status**: In active development  \n**Beta Release**: Q1 2026  \n**General Availability**: Q3 2026  \n\n## Stay Updated\n\n&lt;CardGroup cols={2}&gt;\n  &lt;Card\n    title=\"Discord Community\"\n    icon=\"discord\"\n    href=\"https://discord.gg/yUpgtxnZky\"\n  &gt;\n    Join our Discord for API development updates\n  &lt;/Card&gt;\n  &lt;Card\n    title=\"Email Updates\"\n    icon=\"envelope\"\n    href=\"mailto:founders@summerengine.com?subject=API Updates\"\n  &gt;\n    Get notified when the API launches\n  &lt;/Card&gt;\n&lt;/CardGroup&gt;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "title: \"API Coming Soon\"",
            "lineNumber": 2

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "- Create and manage Summer projects via API",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 21

          {
            "text": "- Access project intelligence and codebase analysis",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "### Asset Generation",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- AI-powered art generation through API calls",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- Batch processing for multiple assets",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "We're currently working with select partners for early API access. If you're interested in being part of our API beta program:",

        "contents": "### Check Creator Portfolios\nIf you like one asset from a creator, check their profile for similar high-quality work.\n\n### Save to Collections\nUse collections to organize assets by project, style, or theme for easy retrieval.\n\n### Regular Browsing\nNew assets are uploaded daily. Regular browsing helps you stay current with community trends.\n\n## Mobile and Responsive Design\n\nThe gallery works seamlessly across devices:\n- **Desktop**: Full-featured browsing with detailed previews\n- **Tablet**: Touch-optimized interface with gesture navigation\n- **Mobile**: Streamlined experience perfect for inspiration on-the-go\n\n## Integration with Summer Projects\n\nAssets from the gallery integrate directly into your Summer workflow:\n\n### Automatic Import\nDownloaded assets appear in your project's asset browser immediately.\n\n### Smart Organization\nSummer automatically categorizes assets based on type and suggests appropriate folders.\n\n### AI Context\nSummer's AI learns from your asset choices to make better suggestions for future generations.\n\n### Version Tracking\nAsset usage is tracked with your project's version control system.\n\n## Supporting Human Artists\n\nThe Summer community values and supports human creativity:\n\n### Discover Human Artists\n- Use the \"Human-Created\" filter to find assets made by real artists\n- Browse artist profiles to see their full portfolios\n- Follow your favorite artists to stay updated on their new work\n\n### Fair Compensation\n- Artists can set commercial licensing fees for their work\n- Revenue sharing ensures artists get paid when their work is used commercially\n- Direct tip/support options for artists you want to encourage\n\n### Community Recognition\n- Featured artist spotlights highlighting exceptional work\n- Community voting for \"Artist of the Month\"\n- Special badges and recognition for top human contributors\n\n&lt;Tip&gt;\n**Support the Community**: When you use human-created assets in a successful game, consider reaching out to thank the artist or hire them for custom work. Building these relationships strengthens the entire game dev ecosystem.\n&lt;/Tip&gt;\n\n## Next Steps\n\n&lt;CardGroup cols={2}&gt;\n  ",

                  "lineNumber": 9,
                  "content": "The Summer Asset Store showcases **human-created game assets** from our community of artists and developers. We believe AI has a place in prototyping, but human creativity produces the art that makes games memorable."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 233,
                  "content": "**Support the Community**: When you use human-created assets in a successful game, consider reaching out to thank the artist or hire them for custom work. Building these relationships strengthens the entire game dev ecosystem."

                  "lineNumber": 11,
                  "content": "**Our Philosophy**: AI art is a tool, like Photoshop or Blender. We're transparent about what's AI-generated and what's human-made, because both have their place in game development."

Here’s a summary of the updates:

### Changes made

**1. `art-system/ai-generation.mdx`**
- Title: "AI Art Generation" → **"AI Asset Generation"**
- Description updated to: "Create, upload, organize, and import game assets—AI-generated or your own—directly into your games"
- Section renamed to **"AI Assets for Game Development"**
- Added Studio workflow: create assets, upload and organize your own, and have Summer import any asset into your games on command
- Replaced "AI art" with "AI assets" throughout
- Getting Started: first step now points to Studio and the Create tabs (2D, 3D, Audio, Video)
- Integration section: clarified My Assets Library and Summer’s ability to import any asset on command

**2. `art-system/overview.mdx`**
- Philosophy: "AI art" → "AI assets"
- Card: "AI Prototyping Tools" → "AI Asset Generation" with the Studio workflow
- Getting Started: "Access the Art System" → "Access Studio"
- Step 3: now references Studio’s Create tabs instead of a generic AI generation tool
- "When generating AI art" → "When generating AI assets"

**3. `essentials/faq.mdx`**
- Question: "How Good is the AI-Generated Art?" → **"How Good are AI-Generated Assets?"**
- Answer: "AI art in Summer" → "AI assets in Summer"

The docs now use **"AI assets"** instead of "AI art" and describe the Studio workflow: create, upload, organize, and import assets into games on command.

We believe AI has a place in prototyping, but human creativity produces the art that makes games memorable.\\n\\n**What You'll Find:**\\n- Professional-quality sprites and animations\\n- Hand-crafted textures and materials\\n- UI elements with attention to detail\\n- Unique artistic styles and interpretations\\n\\n**Our Standards:**\\n- All assets are created by real artists\\n- Quality reviews ensure professional standards\\n- Clear licensing for commercial use\\n- Support for artists through fair compensation\\n\\n## Accessing the Summer Asset Store\\n\\n&amp;lt;CardGroup cols={2}&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Card title=\\\"In Summer Editor\\\" icon=\\\"desktop\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Navigate to Art → Browse Asset Store in the S [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\ntitle: \\\"Publishing to Steam\\\"\\ndescription: \\\"Complete guide to releasing your game on Steam with Summer Engine\\\"\\nicon: \\\"steam\\\"\\n---\\n\\n## Overview\\n\\nSteam is the **largest PC gaming platform** with 120+ million active users. This guide walks you through uploading your Summer Engine game to Steam.\\n\\n**Prerequisites**:\\n- Exported game builds for your target platforms ([macOS](/publishing/macos-export), [Windows](/publishing/windows-export))\\n- Steamworks developer account\\n- $100 Steam Direct fee (one-time per game)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Before You Begin: Steamworks Setup\\n\\n### 1. Create Steam Partner Account\\n\\n&amp;lt;Steps&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Sign Up\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Visit [Steamworks](https://partner.steamgames.com/) and create an account\\n  &amp;lt;/Step&amp;gt;\\n\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Complete Tax Forms\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Required by Valve for revenue distribution (W-8/W-9 forms)\\n  &amp;lt;/Step&amp;gt;\\n\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Pay Steam Direct Fee\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    $100 per game (one-time, recou [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2050,
                  "content": "        \"detailedLines\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2258,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**You can do this while developing** - store pages can be \\\"Coming Soon\\\" for wishlists.\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2350,
                  "content": "        \"detailedLines\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2524,

                {
                  "lineNumber": 3617,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\ntitle: \\\"AI Art Generation\\\"\\ndescription: \\\"Create custom game assets using AI with style presets and prompt enhancement\\\"\\nicon: \\\"wand-magic-sparkles\\\"\\n---\\n\\n## AI Art for Prototyping\\n\\nSummer's AI art generation is designed specifically for **game development prototyping**. It's not about creating final production art—it's about getting your game playable and testable quickly.\\n\\n**Realistic Expectations:**\\n- AI art works best for simple, clear concepts\\n- Complex or stylized art may need refinement\\n- Perfect for placeholders and iteration\\n- Not suitable for polished, commercial releases\\n\\n**What AI Art Does Well:**\\n- Basic character sprites and animations\\n- Simple environment backgrounds\\n- UI elements and buttons\\n- Concept exploration and mood boards\\n\\n**What Needs Human Artists:**\\n- Complex character designs with personality\\n- Detailed environment art\\n- Brand-consistent visual style\\n- High-quality promotional materials\\n\\n## Getting Start [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3619,
                  "content": "        \"detailedLines\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3712,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- Detailed environment art\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3804,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"Start with the main subject, then add details about style, mood, and composition:\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3879,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"Wooden game button with gold trim, fantasy RPG style, glowing hover effect, ornate carved details\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3916,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4940,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"**Workaround**: Switch to standard models for editor operations\\n\\n## Performance\\n\\n### Large Projects\\n\\n**Supported**: Up to 50K files per project\\n\\n**Performance**: Initial indexing may take 2-5 minutes for large projects\\n\\n**Optimization**: Text files get full analysis, assets get metadata scanning\\n\\n## Coming Soon\\n\\n&amp;lt;AccordionGroup&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Accordion icon=\\\"clock\\\" title=\\\"Advanced import settings\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    AI-assisted asset import configuration is on the roadmap.\\n  &amp;lt;/Accordion&amp;gt;\\n  \\n  &amp;lt;Accordion icon=\\\"clock\\\" title=\\\"Large-scale refactoring\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Cross-file refactoring and project-wide changes are in development.\\n  &amp;lt;/Accordion&amp;gt;\\n  \\n  &amp;lt;Accordion icon=\\\"clock\\\" title=\\\"Visual shader editing\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Visual shader graph AI assistance is planned.\\n  &amp;lt;/Accordion&amp;gt;\\n  \\n  &amp;lt;Accordion icon=\\\"clock\\\" title=\\\"Animation timeline\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    AI-assisted animation keyframing is coming.\\n  &amp;lt;/Accordion&amp;gt;\\n&amp;lt;/AccordionGro [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                {
                  "lineNumber": 5227,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\ntitle: \\\"Migrating from Godot\\\"\\ndescription: \\\"How to transition from Godot to Summer\\\"\\nicon: \\\"arrow-right\\\"\\n---\\n\\n## Coming from Godot?\\n\\nIf you're familiar with Godot, you'll feel right at home in Summer. The interface, node system, and scripting work exactly the same way you're used to.\\n\\n&amp;lt;Note&amp;gt;\\nQuick migrations will soon be available. As Summer is based on the Godot codebase, it allows us to focus on making the best AI-powered game development experience while maintaining a familiar editing environment. This makes it easy to migrate your existing Godot settings to Summer.\\n&amp;lt;/Note&amp;gt;\\n\\n## What's the Same\\n\\nEverything you know about Godot still applies in Summer:\\n\\n- **Node system** - All the same nodes, properties, and relationships\\n- **GDScript &amp;amp; C#** - Your existing scripts work without changes  \\n- **Scene structure** - &amp;#96;.tscn&amp;#96; files are byte-for-byte identical\\n- **Project settings** - Same export options and configurat [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5229,
                  "content": "        \"detailedLines\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5361,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**No proprietary formats. No metadata injection.** A &amp;#96;git diff&amp;#96; between a Summer-edited file and a Godot-edited file shows only your changes.\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5442,
                  "content": "      \"score\": 0.24209606647491455"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5455,
                  "content": "        \"detailedLines\": ["
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5790,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\ntitle: \\\"MCP Access\\\"\\ndescription: \\\"Summer's Model Context Protocol integration is in development\\\"\\nicon: \\\"plug\\\"\\n---\\n\\n## Coming Soon\\n\\nWe're building MCP (Model Context Protocol) access to Summer, enabling seamless integration with Cursor, VS Code, and any other IDE that supports MCP. This will let you access Summer's AI capabilities directly from your favorite development environment.\\n\\n## What's Coming\\n\\nOur MCP server will provide:\\n\\n### Seamless IDE Integration\\n- Access Summer's AI directly from Cursor, VS Code, or any MCP-compatible editor\\n- Natural language requests without leaving your development environment\\n- Context-aware responses based on your current project and files\\n\\n### Game Development Tools\\n- **Scene Generation**: \\\"Create a main menu scene with these buttons...\\\"\\n- **Code Analysis**: \\\"Review this player controller for performance issues\\\"\\n- **Asset Management**: \\\"Generate placeholder sprites for these characters\\\"\\n- ** [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                  "lineNumber": 5792,

                  "lineNumber": 5817,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5988,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- ❌ Must contact creator before use\\n- ❌ Custom licensing terms\\n- ❌ Usage rights negotiated individually\\n\\n&amp;lt;Warning&amp;gt;\\nAlways check the license before using an asset in your project. When in doubt, contact the creator directly.\\n&amp;lt;/Warning&amp;gt;\\n\\n## Downloading Assets\\n\\n&amp;lt;Steps&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Find Your Asset\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Use filters and search to locate the perfect asset\\n  &amp;lt;/Step&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Check License\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Verify the licensing terms match your project needs\\n  &amp;lt;/Step&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Download\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    Click the download button to save the asset\\n  &amp;lt;/Step&amp;gt;\\n  &amp;lt;Step title=\\\"Import to Project\\\"&amp;gt;\\n    In Summer, assets are automatically available in your project browser\\n  &amp;lt;/Step&amp;gt;\\n&amp;lt;/Steps&amp;gt;\\n\\n## Community Interaction\\n\\n### Liking Assets\\nShow appreciation for community creations by liking assets you find useful or inspiring. This helps creators understand what the community values.\\n\\n## [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 6237,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\ntitle: \\\"API Coming Soon\\\"\\ndescription: \\\"Summer's API is currently in development\\\"\\n---\\n\\n## Coming Soon\\n\\nSummer's API is currently under active development. We're building a comprehensive API that will allow developers to integrate Summer's AI capabilities into their own tools and workflows.\\n\\n## What's Coming\\n\\nOur API will include:\\n\\n### AI Chat Integration\\n- Programmatic access to Summer's AI chat functionality\\n- Send natural language requests and receive structured responses\\n- Integration with your existing development tools and workflows\\n\\n### Project Management\\n- Create and manage Summer projects via API\\n- Upload and sync project files\\n- Access project intelligence and codebase analysis\\n\\n### Asset Generation\\n- AI-powered art generation through API calls\\n- Batch processing for multiple assets\\n- Integration with the community asset gallery\\n\\n### Webhook Support\\n- Real-time notifications for AI operations\\n- Project change events\\n-  [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 6517,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"### Check Creator Portfolios\\nIf you like one asset from a creator, check their profile for similar high-quality work.\\n\\n### Save to Collections\\nUse collections to organize assets by project, style, or theme for easy retrieval.\\n\\n### Regular Browsing\\nNew assets are uploaded daily. Regular browsing helps you stay current with community trends.\\n\\n## Mobile and Responsive Design\\n\\nThe gallery works seamlessly across devices:\\n- **Desktop**: Full-featured browsing with detailed previews\\n- **Tablet**: Touch-optimized interface with gesture navigation\\n- **Mobile**: Streamlined experience perfect for inspiration on-the-go\\n\\n## Integration with Summer Projects\\n\\nAssets from the gallery integrate directly into your Summer workflow:\\n\\n### Automatic Import\\nDownloaded assets appear in your project's asset browser immediately.\\n\\n### Smart Organization\\nSummer automatically categorizes assets based on type and suggests appropriate folders.\\n\\n### AI Context\\nSummer' [... omitted end of long line]"

                {
                  "lineNumber": 9170,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"Summer Engine is an AI-powered game engine — \\\"Cursor for game development.\\\" We reverse-engineered Cursor's plan mode extensively and have detailed documentation of exactly how it works: the AI writes a plan, it's stored as a markdown file with YAML frontmatter, the user reviews it, clicks \\\"Build\\\" to execute, and the AI implements the plan. The full Cursor plan mode analysis is in &amp;#96;Docs/prompt_test/plan_mode/&amp;#96; — read both files there carefully:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 10349,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- Agents can be resumed using the &amp;#96;resume&amp;#96; parameter by passing the agent ID from a previous invocation. When resumed, the agent continues with its full previous context preserved. When NOT resuming, each invocation starts fresh and you should provide a detailed task description with all necessary context.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 10353,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- When using the Task tool, the subagent invocation does not have access to the user's message or prior assistant steps. Therefore, you should provide a highly detailed task description with all necessary context for the agent to perform its task autonomously.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 10385,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"When speaking to the USER about which model you selected for a Task/subagent, do NOT reveal these internal model alias names (e.g., fast, alpha, beta, gamma). Instead, use natural language such as \\\"a faster model\\\", \\\"a more capable model\\\", or \\\"the default model\\\".\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 10583,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"These are **completely different sections** from the parent's (tone_and_style, citing_code, inline_line_numbers, terminal_files_information, etc.).                 },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 10764,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- Agents can be resumed using the &amp;#96;resume&amp;#96; parameter by passing the agent ID from a previous invocation.                 },

                  "content": "Embeddings of indexed codebases and obfuscated metadata are stored with Turbopuffer on Google Cloud servers in the US. This enables Summer's project intelligence features. You can read more on [Turbopuffer's security page](https://turbopuffer.com/docs/security)."
